dependencyComments.@prisma/client: Typed database client used by repositories and services.
dependencyComments.cors: Enables the CORS-open agent and browser endpoints required by the spec.
dependencyComments.dotenv: Loads environment variables for local development and test execution.
dependencyComments.ethers: Builds, signs, and monitors USDC transactions on Avalanche C-Chain.
dependencyComments.express: Provides the HTTP server and routing layer for AISLE APIs.
dependencyComments.express-rate-limit: Applies the shared request throttling for agent endpoints.
dependencyComments.openai: Calls the OpenAI API for recommendation and grocery-list generation.
dependencyComments.uuid: Generates stable request and entity identifiers.
dependencyComments.zod: Validates API inputs and environment configuration with typed schemas.
dependencyComments.@types/express: TypeScript types for Express request and response objects.
dependencyComments.@types/node: TypeScript types for the Node.js runtime.
dependencyComments.@types/supertest: TypeScript types for HTTP integration testing helpers.
dependencyComments.prisma: Provides schema, migration, and seed tooling for PostgreSQL.
dependencyComments.supertest: Executes HTTP integration tests against the Express app.
dependencyComments.tsx: Runs TypeScript files directly in development and script workflows.
dependencyComments.typescript: Compiles and type-checks the backend codebase.
dependencyComments.vitest: Runs unit and integration tests with coverage reporting.
